title: Thai Flatbread with Rustic Spices
description: A flavorful flatbread recipe with rustic spices and a Thai twist. Perfect for a quick snack or as a side dish.

ingredients.name: Rustic Spices
ingredients.notes: Combine cumin, coriander, and paprika for a unique blend.

ingredients.name: Turkish Flour
ingredients.notes: Use all-purpose flour as a substitute if Turkish flour is not available.

ingredients.name: Flatbread
ingredients.notes: Use store-bought or homemade flatbread for this recipe.

ingredients.name: Coconut Oil
ingredients.notes: Use for brushing flatbread before baking.

ingredients.name: Sesame Seeds
ingredients.notes: Optional topping for added crunch and flavor.

ingredients.name: Chili Flakes
ingredients.notes: Add heat to your flatbread with a pinch of chili flakes.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Season with salt to bring out the flavors.

instructions: Combine rustic spices and brush flatbread with coconut oil.
Sprinkle sesame seeds and chili flakes on top of the flatbread.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
